summary: Tested QuestionPage.jsx complete redesign. All 10 features verified. 3-section layout (TOP BAR + QUESTION CARD + SIDE PANEL) working correctly. All data-testid buttons functional. Full game flow tested from /mode → /setup → /categories → /game → /question.

issues: Side panel renders on the LEFT side (not right as spec says يمين) due to RTL flex direction. This is expected RTL behavior but worth noting. Question card is on the right (dominant side) in RTL which is visually correct.

Timer controls (ابدأ/ايقاف/reset) appear centered under circular timer but the active team name 'يجيب الآن - فريق أحمر' shows on the RIGHT side of the card header, and the points badge (300) shows on LEFT (due to RTL). Design is clean and readable.

critical_code_review_comments: diffBadge uses optional chaining incorrectly on line 128: `diffBadge?.[300]` - this would be `undefined` as a fallback since diffBadge is already the result of the object index. Should be `{ label: 'سهل', color: '#6ee7b7', bg: '...', border: '...' }` as the default. Minor bug that won't cause visible issues since difficulty is always 300/600/900.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QuestionPage redesign fully tested and working. Full game flow verified: mode → setup (team names) → categories → game board → question page. Use data-testid='tile-{catId}-{diff}-{slot}' to click tiles on game board. Use wait_for_selector('[data-testid="reveal-answer-btn"]') to confirm question page loaded (not wait_for_url since it can be slow). All timer controls, reveal answer, assign score, continue button work correctly. Question images load and display correctly with loading state.

features_verified.top_bar_structure: ✅ back-to-board button, session name 'كأس حُجّة', category name, active team scores with highlight
features_verified.question_card_header: ✅ Active team name with pulse dot, circular timer (59s countdown), difficulty badge (300 نقطة)
features_verified.timer_controls: ✅ pause/resume toggles correctly (ايقاف ↔ تشغيل), reset button, start button all working
features_verified.question_image: ✅ Renders when present (tested with flags category - German flag visible), loading state implemented
features_verified.reveal_answer: ✅ كشف الإجابة button works, shows answer text (ألمانيا)
features_verified.assignment_buttons: ✅ assign-team1-btn, assign-team2-btn, skip-points-btn all visible and clickable after reveal
features_verified.continue_btn: ✅ Appears after assignment, navigates back to /game
features_verified.side_panel: ✅ Shows both teams (فريق أحمر, فريق أزرق) with scores and 3 lifeline icons each
features_verified.active_team_highlight: ✅ Active team (فريق أحمر) highlighted with glow in card header, side panel shows 'دور الإجابة' badge, score updates after assignment (+300 visible in top bar)
